name: Potential Command and Scripting Interpreters
notes: This rule triggers when a command and scripting interpreters are detected.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atlassian Confluence Spawning, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Loaders, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
TD_list: APPLY Potential Command and Scripting Interpreters on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atlassian Confluence Spawning, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Loaders, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
RED_list: Event name: Potential Command and Scripting Interpreters
Event description: Detects when a command and scripting interpreters are detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
